entities.description: The process of seed development into a plant, facilitated by PgPM19

entities.description: A plant hormone (ABA) that orchestrates stress responses and development

entities.description: A model plant used to study the effects of PgPM19

entities.description: The biological process of producing abscisic acid

entities.description: The mechanism by which ABA transmits signals within the plant

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Water deficiency stress that induces PgPM19 expression

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: High temperature stress that induces PgPM19 expression

entities.name: YEAST CELLS
entities.description: Organisms used to test the expression of PgPM19

entities.description: An osmotic stress agent used in yeast cell tests

entities.name: SORBITOL
entities.description: An osmotic stress agent used in yeast cell tests

entities.name: NACL STRESS
entities.description: Salt stress specifically using sodium chloride

entities.name: FRESH WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of plant tissue including water, increased by PgPM19 overexpression

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: The length of plant roots, increased by PgPM19 overexpression

entities.description: A method used to analyze the expression of genes in PgPM19_OE plants
